chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الزَّرْعِ وَ الْغَرْسِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 125 – What is to be said during the cultivation and the planting

text: عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ بَشِيرٍ عَنِ ابْنِ مُضَارِبٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ لَا تَقْطَعُوا الثِّمَارَ فَيَبْعَثَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْكُمُ الْعَذَابَ صَبّاً.

en.hubeali: From Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al Husayn Bin Basheer, from Ibn Muzarib,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Do not cut down the fruit-bearing trees, for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Send upon you a difficult Punishment’.
